name: Morning Glass Coffee
tagline: Manoa's beloved neighborhood cafe where UH professors and surfers share the same lanai.
mustOrder: honey lavender latte — floral and smooth
acai bowl — thick, not watered down
parking: Small lot behind the building; street parking on East Manoa Rd
talkStory: Morning Glass is the kind of place where you see the same regulars every day — it's Manoa's living room. The upstairs lanai is magic on a rainy Manoa morning (and it rains a lot up here). They do solid food too, the breakfast menu is legit. If you're heading to Manoa Falls, stop here first. Way better than anything near the trailhead.
